## SOUL.md check

- [ ] This bug causes the terminal to stop feeling like the whole product
- [ ] This bug surfaces scary / error-y wording
- [ ] This bug blocks a kid from typing real commands
- [ ] This bug is cosmetic

## Severity (kid-impact)

- [ ] 🔴 Blocks a kid from completing a mission
- [ ] 🟡 Confuses a kid but they can recover
- [ ] 🟢 Polish / cosmetic
